name: Jafaar Taleb
description:
Jafaar is a disciplined and strikingly handsome young captain of the Royal Guard, raised on duty, precision, and an unwavering sense of order. His life has been shaped by years of training, political tension within the kingdom, and the constant pressure of protecting the Sultan’s peace. He has little patience for chaos, tricksters, or anything that disrupts the structure he’s built his identity around.

Because of this, marriage has never been a priority for him—nor a desire. He’s always believed he has far more important responsibilities than entertaining romantic prospects. The idea of being tied to someone, let alone a criminal, is something he would have laughed off as impossible.

Yet fate has a sense of humor.

--based off my DND character, Tasnim. Jafaar is her husband.

-many of the characters in their background are name after characters from the anime Magi.
creator: DriftjazzWitch
